title: ArtifactEnvelope
description: STEPWORK Artifact Envelope v1 (SYSTEM_SPEC §11.1). Every discrete artifact (transcript, analysis report, topic proposal, content version, rendered video, etc.) MUST be wrapped in this envelope.

artifactType.description: Artifact type identifier (e.g. transcript, content-analysis, topic-proposal, content-version, rendered-video). Namespaced kebab-case.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope schema version. Fixed to "1" for v1.

id.description: Stable identifier of the producer (user id, model id, agent id, plugin id, or system component name)

protocol.description: Optional protocol through which the artifact was produced (e.g. mcp, a2a, acp)

content.description: Inline artifact content (JSON-serializable). Mutually exclusive with contentUri.

contentUri.description: URI to externally-stored content (e.g. file:// for local binary, or content-addressed URI). Mutually exclusive with content.

sourceRefs.description: List of artifactIds / sourceAssetIds / external URIs this artifact derives from

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical content (64 lowercase hex chars)

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the artifact was produced
